RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0011 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Grace Mensah Date of Birth: 15/12/2002 SSN (tokenized): TKN-233918 Annual Income: $135,000 Employer: Umbrella Co Loan Amount: $55,000 Term (months): 72 Branch: Austin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN23892AL Honda Model 3 2018 Hybrid CPO 38,000 VIN26910AL Honda Model 3 2024 Hybrid CPO 34,000 Authorized Signature: Grace Mensah
